prose: Frontier orbital analysis of aniline computed via DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level in PySCF, tier 'standard', in the gas phase (charge 0, singlet multiplicity). Geometry was provided as '/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz' — no further relaxation was performed (single-point calculation). SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO energy: −5.553772 eV, LUMO energy: −0.2489544 eV → HOMO-LUMO gap: 5.3048177 eV. Reproducibility: input file '/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz', command: '/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpznznmqnl/live.json'.
